typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured (pure Python, no mypy)"

nonBlockingIssues.description: Minor list comprehension inefficiency in _generate_fourteen_day_changes(): newly_emerging filter rebuilds [d['name'] for d in rising_dirs] per iteration. Should extract to a set.
Change values in fourteen_day_changes are synthetic (derived from heat via formula), not real 14-day deltas. Acceptable for current single-snapshot pipeline.
Commit 3a7e397 includes 32 unrelated files (22 PNGs, 7 output files, 3 doc files) alongside the 5 relevant source/data files. Caused by 'git add -A' sweeping up previously untracked files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix CSS variable name typo: AGENTS.md says '--color-judgment-zhidegen' (missing trailing 'g') but the actual CSS and HTML consistently use '--color-judgment-zhidegeng'. Change 'zhidegen' to 'zhidegeng' in the 'CSS Variable Names for Judgment States' section to match the real code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dashboard/css/style.css:25 defines '--color-judgment-zhidegeng: #10b981', dashboard/index.html:49-51 uses '--color-judgment-zhidegeng', but AGENTS.md documents it as '--color-judgment-zhidegen'. The same typo appears in .factory/skills/dashboard-visual-worker/SKILL.md:44.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add git staging convention: 'When committing, only stage files directly related to the feature. Avoid git add -A which sweeps unrelated files into the commit.' This prevents bloated commits that mix feature changes with unrelated artifacts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-fourteen-day-changes-and-css-mismatch commit 3a7e397 included 32 unrelated files (PNGs, output files, docs) alongside 5 relevant source files due to 'git add -A'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: bridge-worker SKILL.md Step 4 requires agent-browser visual verification for any frontend changes. The fix worker verified CSS variable changes via grep only (sufficient for this case but deviated from procedure). Consider clarifying that grep-based verification is acceptable for pure text substitution changes (CSS variable renames, etc.) where visual rendering is already validated by a prior worker or will be validated in user-testing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-fourteen-day-changes-and-css-mismatch worker's transcript shows grep verification only (no agent-browser). The original frontend-data-switch-and-bugfixes worker had already verified the 观察中 row rendering via agent-browser, and user-testing will re-verify.
